text:
Is there a link to read the rest? (I wasn't aware you had a blog.)

This is totally appropriate devlog content.

text: The weekly blog goes out to all my patrons, to let them know what their contributions are supporting. I crosspost it to a paid-for substack too (for the people that don't like paying patreon). Here's a secret link to see this week: <https://todepond.substack.com/p/439cae62-0a34-4b32-9c93-eabc7322ba3d>
